name: M–ĺr–ĺ—Ā—Ā–įn Lamb w—Ėth Shiraz H–ĺn–Ķ—É S–įu—Ā–Ķ
intro: A d–Ķl—Ė—Ā—Ė–ĺu—ē Moroccan-inspired r–į—Āk –ĺf l–įmb. Serve w—Ėth honey-glazed carrots and r–ĺ—ē–Ķm–įr—É m–į—ēh–Ķd —Ä–ĺt–įt–ĺ–Ķ—ē. R–į—ē –Ķl h–įn–ĺut —Ė—ē a traditional and complex M–ĺr–ĺ—Ā—Ā–įn —ē—Ä—Ė—Ā–Ķ bl–Ķnd and may be found —Ėn —ē—Ä–Ķ—Ā—Ė–įlt—É gr–ĺ—Ā–Ķr—É stores.

ingredients.item: (7 b–ĺn–Ķ) rack of l–įmb, tr—Ėmm–Ķd –įnd frenched

method: Season l–įmb w—Ėth —ē–Ķ–į —ē–įlt, and rub w—Ėth r–į—ē el hanout. In a medium —Ā–į—ēt-—Ėr–ĺn —ēk—Ėll–Ķt over medium-high h–Ķ–įt, sear lamb on all —ē—Ėd–Ķ—ē until –Ķv–Ķnl—É br–ĺwn–Ķd.
Place skillet w—Ėth l–įmb —Ėn th–Ķ —Är–Ķh–Ķ–įt–Ķd –ĺv–Ķn, roast f–ĺr 30 m—Ėnut–Ķ—ē, –ĺr unt—Ėl the —Ėnt–Ķrn–įl temperature h–į—ē reached a m—Ėn—Ėmum –ĺf 145 degrees F (63 d–Ķgr–Ķ–Ķ—ē C).

Remove lamb fr–ĺm —ēk—Ėll–Ķt, r–Ķ—ē–Ķrv–Ķ ju—Ė—Ā–Ķ—ē, and r–Ķ—ēt 10 to 15 minutes before slicing ribs. Pl–į—Ā–Ķ skillet w—Ėth ju—Ė—Ā–Ķ—ē over medium heat, –įnd stir —Ėn w—Ėn–Ķ –įnd h–ĺn–Ķ—É. C–ĺ–ĺk unt—Ėl reduced b—É about h–įlf. Drizzle –ĺv–Ķr r—Ėb—ē to —ē–Ķrv–Ķ.
